title: incarvillea mairei
intro: Incarvillea mairei, also known as the Chinese Incarvillea, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is a member of the Bignoniaceae family and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Incarvillea mairei include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through infusion or decoction, and it can also be dried to be used in herbal teas or capsules.
